articles.author: Chandelis Duster
articles.title: Trump floats MAGA rally instead of concert after musicians drop out of Freedom 250 - NPR
articles.description: Several artists, including country singer Martina McBride, have withdrawn from the Great American State Fair in Washington, D.C.
articles.content: President Trump has suggested that an event celebrating America's 250 birthday should instead be a Make America Great Again rally after many of the artists who were announced to perform dropped out.… [+2423 chars]

articles.author: Ronald Brownstein
articles.title: A populist will win the Texas Senate race. The question is, which one? - CNN
articles.description: With Republican Ken Paxton and Democrat James Talarico already sparring, the Texas Senate race will offer this year’s most direct collision between the competing theories of populism that now dominate American politics.
articles.content:
Summary
